action.reasoning: Observation: Starting iteration 0 with empty workspace. Need to build a semantic segmentation pipeline for ADE20K and get a baseline score quickly. Analysis: ADE20K has 150 classes, highly imbalanced. A strong backbone + a standard decode head (UPerNet-style) should give a good baseline. I'll use ConvNeXt-Large (198M params, pre-downloaded) from timm as backbone and a custom UPerNet + FCN auxiliary head. Training will be 2 epochs on 4 GPUs with DDP to measure pipeline speed. Predict.py will resize to 512x512 for fast inference, then upsample masks back to original resolution. Decision: Write model.py, train.py, predict.py; train for 2 epochs; test predict.py locally; then submit eval.

command_output.stdout: Args: Namespace(data_dir='/data', epochs=2, batch_size=8, lr=0.0001, weight_decay=0.01, num_workers=4, crop_size=512, save_dir='checkpoints')
